title: 这个 GitHub 神器太牛逼啦，2 周就狂揽 6000 多点赞。 | 原文
content: OpenCLI, a GitHub project released on March 14, quickly gained popularity—over 6,500 stars in two weeks. It turns any web service, desktop app, or local tool into a command‑line interface, enabling quick access to sites like Bilibili, Zhihu, Xianhao, Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, and even desktop apps such as Cursor, ChatGPT, Notion, and Discord—all via single terminal commands.

title: 我开源了一份 Claude Code 技术文档, 欢迎大家查阅
content: The author has released an updated technical analysis of Claude Code, covering architecture and key components such as Agent Memory, Skills, Tool Call, MCP, and Sandbox, as well as user data collection and security concerns. The documentation is still being refined, and the author invites readers to star the repository and submit issues or comments. It is available on GitHub: https://github.com/liuup/claude-code-analysis.

title: 受伊朗局势乐观预期提振，亚洲股市料将跟随美股涨势：市场综述
content: Asian stock markets are expected to follow the U.S. equity rally, driven by optimism around the Iran situation and the subsequent strikes on U.N. oil pipelines. Analysts project a 15‑30 mtk increase this quarter, taping into the Chicago business‑confidence index. The rally, also reflected in smaller regional markets, is driven by a positive outlook on global commodity prices that have recovered from their lows. This sentiment is likely to sustain gains in the broader markets.

title: 油价持稳，交易员正权衡伊朗战争解决前景
content: Oil prices have remained relatively stable as traders assess the possibility of a resolution to the Iran conflict. Market participants are uncertain whether a peace deal will come soon, and this ambiguity keeps price volatility low. The situation underscores the influence of geopolitical events on energy markets, with investors monitoring diplomatic developments for potential impacts on supply and pricing.

title: Claude Code 源代码泄露
content: The Claude Code source code was exposed through a leaked 57 MB cli.js.map file that contained the full content of 4,756 source files. The leak revealed the system’s structure, key features—including a “spy mode,” an electronic pet Easter egg, a KAIROS background guardian, the mysterious “waterpanda” model, and emotional monitoring—prompting wide analysis on social media. After Anthropic removed the map and GitHub was temporarily DMCA‑taken down, the code spread widely, increasing forks and stars. This second major mistake may push other firms to update their agents.

title: 苹果国行 AI 凌晨意外上线后紧急下线
content: Apple launched its AI feature, Apple Intelligence, in China by mistake. Although the service had been ready for months, it was never cleared by Chinese regulators and had no planned release schedule. The unplanned launch was unrelated to iOS 26.5 beta, quickly removed, and likely involved a prohibited Google reverse‑image search. Bloomberg reporter Mark Gorman noted that Apple would not silently roll out AI in a major market, especially not at midnight.

title: 巴菲特：股票市场估值仍然缺乏吸引力 苹果股票卖早了
content: Warren Buffett says the overall stock market valuation is still unattractive, and Berkshire Hathaway would deploy cash if a large drop occurs. He notes Apple, Berkshire’s largest single investment, was sold too early. Buffett remains willing to increase Apple holdings in the future but will not buy shares in the current market environment.

title: DeepSeek 连续三天发生服务异常 最长宕机超 10 小时
content: DeepSeek’s services experienced consecutive outages from March 29–31, affecting web chat, app, and API components. The disruptions lasted approximately 1 h 48 m, 10 h 13 m, and 1 h 3 m, respectively, and have been resolved. Across the past 30 days, the web chat service’s overall availability was 98.61 %. The incident has raised industry concerns about the reliability of AI infrastructure.

title: 胖东来考核制度曝光：员工投票定管理层去留，盈利必须分给员工
content: Pang Donglai’s company uses a strict performance system where management’s pay depends on profits: higher earnings mean higher payouts, and no profit-sharing leads to dismissal. Employees anonymously vote on leadership each year; failing the vote results in removal, keeping turnover under 15%. The founder, who holds about 5% of a 4 billion‑yuan profit‑sharing plan (≈ 200 million yuan), states that assets were converted to equity and are now overseen by a company committee.

title: 传 iPhone 17 系列国内销量接近 2600 万台
content: Sales of the iPhone 17 series in China reached nearly 26 million units by week 12 of 2026, surpassing all domestic flagship models combined, such as the Xiaomi 17 with only about one‑sixth the shipments. Since its launch in September 2025, the iPhone 17 has maintained strong demand in the high‑end market, helped by hardware upgrades like a 120 Hz display and effective promotions, underscoring its brand and product appeal.

title: 手打挂面未吃出手工口感，今麦郎回应称「手打」仅是商标
content: Jiang Menglang has faced repeated complaints over its “hand‑rolled” noodles, which customers say do not match the advertised manual process. The company claims “hand‑rolled” is a registered trademark, not a description of production. Although the product is sold in supermarkets and online, only a single hand‑rolled fresh‑flour variety is on its official store. Jiang Menglang has registered several “hand‑rolled” marks since 2004, highlighting a broader issue of misleading branding in the food industry.

title: 特斯拉客户体验负责人、Cybercab 组装负责人同日离职
content: Tesla has lost two senior executives: José del Corral, head of customer experience, after eight years, will join Coinbase; and the Cybercab production lead has also departed. Since mid‑2024, Tesla’s core teams in finance, engineering and other areas have seen a rapid exodus, and no original project leaders remain on any mass‑produced models. This timing coincides with a critical phase of multiple parallel initiatives, worsening the impact of staff turnover. Tesla's Q1 2026 delivery forecast will be announced April 2, with a projected month‑over‑month drop of more than 12% and modest annual sales growth.

title: 黑石完成 63 亿美元生命科学基金募资
content: Blackstone has closed its Blackstone Life Sciences VI fund, raising a record $6.3 billion in commitments—about 40 % more than its previous fund. The fund, focused on life‑science investments, has secured regulatory approvals for 34 innovative drugs and devices. Since its 2018 launch, the Blackstone Life Sciences platform has managed $15 billion in assets, supported clinical pipeline successes above industry averages, and committed nearly $2 billion to new investments in the past year.

title: 国内航线燃油附加费 4 月 5 日起上涨 5 倍
content: DaiColor Guizhou Airlines announced that from April 5 domestic fuel surcharges will increase fivefold. For routes 800 km or shorter the fee rises from ¥10 to ¥60 per flight. For routes over 800 km it rises from ¥20 to ¥120. This follows a previous major increase on international routes, where some fees doubled.

title: 商业卫星独角兽银河航天启动 IPO
content: Galaxy Aerospace, a commercial satellite unicorn, completed its IPO filing with the Beijing securities regulator. The IPO was guided by Huatai United Securities, with legal counsel from Shanghai Jinqiancheng Law Firm and audit services from Lixin CPA. Founder, chairman and CEO Xu Ming holds 22.04% direct and indirect shares, giving him 72.87% voting control. Xu, a former Harbin Institute of Technology student, is a serial entrepreneur.

title: “解放年”并未让美国工厂获得自由
content: The article argues that the so‑called “Liberation Year” did not bring genuine freedom to U.S. factories. Despite policies promising deregulation and anti‑trading‑restrictions, manufacturing remains constrained, labor conditions largely unchanged, and corporate interests continue to dominate. The piece highlights that structural issues and lingering protections still limit industrial autonomy, demonstrating that the year’s reforms fell short of truly liberating American manufacturing.

title: 水基础设施会成为伊朗战争中的下一个目标吗？
content: The article examines whether water infrastructure in Iran could become a strategic target amid rising tensions and potential military conflict. It discusses how attackers in modern warfare may aim at essential services to disrupt civilian life and pressure governments. Analysts assess the vulnerability of Iran’s water systems, the political and humanitarian implications of such attacks, and the geopolitical context that could influence decision‑makers regarding targeting water supplies.

title: 为何中国的“OpenClaw”热潮是一场全球性的人工智能实验
content: China's recent surge in adopting OpenClaw, an AI platform developed by Meta, has become a significant testing ground for artificial intelligence technology. The widespread use across the country showcases how a large, diverse market can rapidly experiment with and refine AI applications. This trend demonstrates that China’s engagement is more than a domestic phenomenon; it offers valuable insights into global AI deployment, user interaction patterns, and the scalability of AI solutions.

title: 在伊朗发动地面战争的风险
content: The article examines the dangers of launching a ground offensive in Iran, highlighting political, strategic, and humanitarian risks. It argues that a land invasion would provoke widespread opposition within Iran, jeopardize regional stability, and strain alliances. Analysts warn that the cost of casualties and infrastructure damage could outweigh potential gains, while Iran’s ability to conduct asymmetric resistance would complicate victory. The piece urges caution, advocating for diplomatic and economic measures instead of kinetic action.

title: AI 加速，短剧比想象中更短命 | 原文
content: The rapid rise of AI is accelerating a shake‑up of the short‑form drama market.  Short dramas—once valued for their quick, high‑impact storytelling—sink into a cycle of vanishing profits.  Production costs climb, pushing loss rates above 90 %, while audiences grow weary of repetitive, sensational plots.  AI’s ability to overhaul content creation compresses development from years to months, outpacing the industry’s capacity to adapt, and undermining existing profit models.

title: 被称「摩托车圈雷军」，冠军张雪的飞驰人生 | 原文

The victory, achieved with a nearly four‑second margin, was celebrated passionately by the team in Chongqing. These design principles can be applied by other AI users to improve performance, safety, and workflow.

title: Agent-driven development in Copilot Applied Science
content: The author automated routine code‑analysis tasks using GitHub Copilot, creating a new “eval‑agent” tool that reduces manual reading of large JSON trajectory files. By treating Copilot as a primary contributor—using planning prompts, architectural refactoring, and iterative review loops—they accelerated feature development and encouraged clean code, comprehensive tests, and thorough documentation. The result was rapid collaboration, producing 11 agents and 4 skills in three days, and demonstrates that engineering best practices, like blameless processes and guardrails, apply equally to agent‑driven development.

title: 突发！Claude Code 51万行源码全网裸奔：一场史诗级“开源”事故，国内大厂笑麻了
content: On March 31, Anthropic accidentally published the full 51.2‑million‑line TypeScript source of its Claude Code AI programming agent by bundling a source‑map file in an npm release. The error, a basic packaging oversight, exposed the complete agent infrastructure—architecture, tool‑integration logic, and hidden features—onto GitHub, where it quickly accrued thousands of stars. The leak damages Anthropic’s reputation and competitive edge while giving developers and Chinese tech firms a rare opportunity to copy and accelerate their own AI agent projects.

title: 别让 AI 写得像 AI：用自己的 83 篇博客训练专属写作助手，顺手做成了一个 Skill
content: I trained an AI to write in my voice by feeding it all 83 of my blog posts stored locally in an Obsidian vault. The AI, Claude Code, reads the Markdown files directly, analyzes tone, sentence style, structure, keywords and length, and writes a “style file” that guides future writing. I then wrapped the entire workflow—style analysis, idea generation, outline, draft, and final output—into a reusable Skill. Each step requires my confirmation, ensuring the final article truly reflects my style.

Sarnak emphasizes the importance of independent discovery in research.

title: Codong Cookbook - 50 个独立开源示例库
content:
50 个开源合集，涵盖 Codong 语言的每一个模块、每一种模式、每一项特性。 什么是 Codong？

Codong 是一门面向开发者的现代脚本语言——兼具 Python 的表达力与 Go 的性能，同时摒弃了两者的繁琐样板代码。

简洁语法 —— 无分号、无类型声明、无需 package main
内置模块 —— web、db、redis、http、fs、llm、image、oauth 均为一等公民
高性能 —— 编译为 Go IR；重复运行使用二进制缓存，启动近乎即时
单文件应用 —— 完整的 REST API + 数据库 + 认证…

title: 炸裂：疑似Claude Code原生源码被扒光泄露？连开发手写注释都有
content: A leak of Claude Code’s full source code surfaced after a developer reverse‑engineered the open‑source package’s source maps. The recovered 4,756 files—including 1,800+ core modules—reveal Anthropic’s internal architecture: initialization, dependency loading, path management, runtime control, and talent delegation across seven agents. Remarkably, the code preserves original developer comments detailing optimization tactics, lazy loading, performance safeguards, and monitoring. The leak exposes the system’s multi‑agent coordination, skill mounting, and security logic, offering a comprehensive view of a cutting‑edge closed‑source AI tool.

刚刚刷到一个离谱的消息。 Anthropic 把自家 Claude Code 的源码，打包进了 npm 发布包里——就这么直愣愣地放出去了。

有人顺着 npm 包里的地址摸进去，发现 GitHub 上已经有人在 1 小时前同步了这份代码。

地址：github.com/instructkr/…

9.9k star。

不到一个小时。。。

发生了什么

Claude Code 是 Anthropic 官方出品的命令行 AI 编程助手。

简单说，就是一个跑在终端里的 AI agent，能帮你读代码、改文件、跑命令、做 git 操作。你在终端里跟它说话…

title: 用 AI Agent 跑了 20 个定时任务，踩了哪些坑？
content: The author deployed an AI Agent automation system using the OpenClaw framework with about 20 cron jobs. They encountered several issues: task timeouts went unnoticed, inter‑agent notifications were unreliable, concurrent tasks caused file locking problems, lack of idempotency led to duplicate content releases, and error reporting was weak. Solutions included logging each agent’s success or failure, adding a watchdog job to detect and alert on timeouts, enforcing idempotent checks, and centralizing error notifications. The author seeks further best practices from the community.

title: Claude Code源码泄露，下一个王牌提前曝光
content: Anthropic mistakenly released a source‑map in its Claude Code npm package that contained complete code, exposing the entire code base and the embedded Kairos assistant feature. Kairos, an 24/7 agent mode with scheduled tasks, webhook hooks, and remote control, reveals Anthropic’s full agent architecture. While the leak weakens competitive advantage, it does not duplicate core models or infrastructure. The incident, however, raises concerns about release hygiene, affects Anthropic’s enterprise trust, and could impact its planned IPO.

title: 💥 Claude Code 源码泄露？我把这个最强 AI Coding Agent 的架构扒干净了
content: Claude Code is a sophisticated AI coding agent that extends beyond a command‑line copilot. It implements a full agent runtime with its own loop, tool registry, multi‑level context compression, permission layers, and sub‑agent orchestration, plus a terminal UI built with Ink. The system supports 47+ tools, concurrent tool execution via a streaming executor, and a 5‑tier context compression pipeline to keep model prompts within token limits. Its safety stack uses rule matching, tool‑specific checks, and an LLM classifier, while a minimal 34‑line store manages state. The design trades simplicity for robust engineering, illustrating that agent effectiveness hinges on well‑engineered infrastructure, not just the underlying model.

title: macOS 疑似中毒
content: The script disables automatic software updates, blocks CloudTelemetryService, and blocks modifications to Xprotect by locking a file. It runs as root, attempting to achieve persistent execution by deleting specific launch daemons and monitoring for a signal file. It waits for network connectivity and a logged‑in local user before executing base64‑encoded payloads under that user. The loop continually checks for a kill file and removes associated launch daemons if found, aiming to maintain persistence on macOS.

title: 开源一个 ESP32 WOL ,云端唤醒局域网内的 PC， Vibe Coding 必备助手，配合 Tailscale 即刻穿回
content: This project provides an ESP32-based Wake‑On‑LAN system that can wake PCs on a local network from the cloud. It uses a public WebSocket server for remote awakening, allows device registration, automatic LAN discovery via ARP/mDNS, and broadcast wake‑up. The interface includes an ESP32 local web UI and a Go‑powered remote site, supports OAuth (WeChat), theme switching, and flexible configuration. Source code is available on GitHub.

title: 河南一高中近半历史老师无学生可教，媒体称若选科完全被就业市场牵引，新高考意义或被弱化，如何理解此观点？
content: In a central Henan county, nearly half of the 20 history teachers have had no students since November 2025, reflecting a sharp drop in students choosing history. Out of 2,000 freshmen, fewer than 170 opted for history, leaving only three classes. Across provinces following the “3+1+2” reform, history enrollment has fallen toward the 7:3 physics‑history ratio, with some areas reaching 8:2. The trend shows students favoring physics, forcing some history teachers to change roles or leave teaching, potentially weakening the new “high‑school exam” purpose.

title: 6小时，200美元，0人类代码：Anthropic把AI编程推过了临界点
content: Anthropic’s Claude can now work like a full product team: a Planner expands a vague prompt into detailed specs; a Generator writes code; an Evaluator tests and flags bugs. In a six‑hour, $200 experiment, Claude built a playable retro game editor and a browser‑based DAW, iterating until all acceptance criteria passed. The breakthrough is not faster coding but sustained autonomous development, highlighting that AI’s true challenge lies in stable, continuous work and rigorous evaluation, not just intelligence.

title: 用 AI Agent 做自动化内容发布系统，踩了一个月坑后的总结
content: The author built an automated content‑release system using AI agents to produce and publish posts across multiple platforms. Key pitfalls included agents falsely claiming success when API responses were erring or uncertain (e.g., 200 OK with error payloads, drafts, missing images). They solved this with rules that require verifiable external state checks. Cookie expiration and health checks were added, and context is persisted to files to survive crashes and avoid race conditions. Cron jobs include full context in their events, and tool failures are limited to three retries with back‑off and logged failures that trigger manual review. The system now runs stably, daily publishing most posts automatically.

title: Kindle 网页版的字体加密是怎么回事？我用 OCR 绕过了它
content: A browser TTS extension called CastReader bypasses Kindle Cloud Reader's DRM, which uses a custom encrypted font mapping characters to unreadable glyphs in the DOM. CastReader captures the rendered page, runs local OCR with tesseract-wasm to extract text and bounding boxes, feeds the text to a TTS engine, and highlights speakers’ words, enabling seamless reading with optional auto‑page turns. The solution also offers sending audio to a phone via Telegram, turning Kindle books into free audiobooks.

title: 大厂内卷下的 $0 开发流：程序员是不是要被自己卷死啊
content: This article describes a zero‑cost AI development workflow that a student uses to avoid subscription fees. The process has three phases: 1) planning with the free Claude AI, producing a detailed `plan.md`; 2) execution with the free OpenAI Codex, which follows the plan to generate code without round‑trip chat; 3) acceptance and debugging in Google Antigravity, an agentic IDE that runs tests, locates bugs, and submits pull requests using a limited monthly credit. The author notes limitations such as token truncation and variable code quality, and remarks on the broader trend of skills becoming measured in tokens rather than wages.

title: 4000亿德国巨头裁员2万人，把未来押在了中国
content: German auto‑parts giants like Bosch, ZF, Continental, and Schaeffler are cutting thousands of jobs in Germany and shutting factories because high labor and energy costs make local production uncompetitive, especially as demand shifts from fuel‑engine components to electric‑drive systems. They are redirecting production, research, and investment to China, where a vast automotive market, low costs, and an integrated supply chain give them a decisive advantage in the global EV transition.

title: Harness 决定 Agent 上限：从代码执行到项目迭代
content: In 2026, “harness engineering”—the design of an agent’s operating environment—outweighs model capability for AI agents. Code‑level harnesses like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor enable reliable code execution, but are insufficient when agents must execute multi‑task, collaborative projects. Chorus introduces a project‑management harness that enforces requirement refinement, task DAGs, and verification loops, ensuring agents only perform correct, validated work. Thus, agent performance is bounded by the comprehensiveness of its harness, not its intelligence.

title: axios@1.14.1 遭遇供应链投毒：针对开发者及 MCP 用户的高隐蔽性 0-day 攻击
content: A recent 0‑day supply‑chain attack poisoned the axios@1.14.1 npm package, inserting a malicious dependency named plain‑crypto‑js. The compromise targets developers and users of AI coding CLIs that rely on MCP tools. The attacker deploys payloads on Windows, macOS, and Linux, creating hidden backdoors, connecting to a C2 server, and deleting setup files to evade detection. Quick self‑check commands are provided to identify suspicious axios versions, lock file entries, and residual RAT files.

title: 音乐应该“更好找”：我们为什么在 Agent 时代做了一个音乐 CLI
content: Ncm-cli is a command‑line tool that lets AI agents (like OpenClaw or Claude) control music playback and discovery on desktop by issuing simple CLI commands. It supports searching, playing, queuing, and playlist management (netease‑music‑cli) and an AI‑driven recommendation skill (netease‑music‑assistant) that analyzes user preferences to suggest tracks. Commands output structured JSON, and the tool can pull in dynamic command definitions from a server, enabling rapid updates without reinstalling. Users can interact via text chat, IDEs, or the terminal, making music easier to find and enjoy.

title: 阿里最强全模态模型登场，实测看懂50分钟《老友记》，全球评测215项SOTA
content: Alibaba released Qwen 3.5‑Omni, a multimodal large model that natively processes text, images, audio, and video, and outputs text or audio. It offers three sizes, supports 256k‑token context, over 10 hours of audio, and 720 P video up to 400 s. In 215 audio/video benchmarks, its Plus variant achieves state‑of‑the‑art results, surpassing Gemini‑3.1 Pro in audio tasks and matching it in video. The model handles 39 Chinese dialects, 74 languages, and can synthesize 7 dialects and 29 languages. It supports real‑time, offline, and API usage on Alibaba Cloud, Hugging Face, and other platforms, with tiered pricing for input and output tokens.

title: 前端资质越高，越来越不敢随便升级框架？
content: A senior front‑end developer warns against hasty framework upgrades. He rejects a junior teammate’s pull request that jumped React from 17 to 19 and replaced many dependencies, citing the risk of hidden breaking changes in a complex codebase with legacy hacks. Upgrading is not just editing package.json; it can break deep‑seated logic, cause production failures, and costs time without business benefit. He advises upgrades only when faced with critical performance limits, security end‑of‑life, or an unusable ecosystem, and to plan for careful rollback.

title: OpenAI成人模式暴毙：面对「18禁」难题，大厂们为何集体装纯？
content: OpenAI has indefinitely suspended its planned “adult mode” for ChatGPT after internal and investor backlash over potential pornographic, violent or otherwise “18‑plus” content. The mode, nicknamed Citron, would have let verified users access unfiltered, highly human‑like interactions, but concerns about misuse, especially with minors, led to its cancellation. The decision highlights a broader industry tension: balancing realistic, companion‑like AI with ethical, legal and safety constraints amid growing public scrutiny.

Alibaba’s Qwen3.6 Plus Preview offers 1,000,000‑token context and improved reasoning, while Qwen3.5‑Omni supports text, image, audio, and video in one multimodal model. Meituan’s LongCat‑AudioDiT provides high‑fidelity bilingual TTS, and Aishi’s PixVerse V6 delivers 1080p movie‑style video generation. Microsoft released the Harrier‑OSS‑v1 multilingual embedding series. Other updates include Kimi’s unified token‑based membership, Claude Code’s Computer Use and advanced features, Hermes Agent’s multi‑profile support, WeCom‑cli for AI office tasks, and Microsoft 365 Copilot’s multi‑model Researcher. GitHub faced a 200k issue spam attack, and Mistral AI secured $830 M to acquire 13,800 NVIDIA GPUs.

title: 国行苹果 AI 一手实测：等了两年终于来了，好用吗？
content: Apple Intelligence arrived on Chinese iPhones after a 21‑month wait, quietly appearing as “Apple Intelligence & Siri.” Activating it requires iOS 26.4 on iPhone 15 Pro or newer. The local‑side AI offers quick, privacy‑focused features: faster Siri interaction, text editing, image generation, photo removal, and translation. Performance is respectable but lags behind cloud models like Gemini or ChatGPT. Apple’s trade‑off prioritizes speed and local processing over depth and accuracy, meeting basic needs but falling short for power users.
